findings.text: Both NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 contain an email from accommodation@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra with attachment 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB).
The email is dated Thu 12/03/2026 10:26, sent to Anfal Elbushra (40805511@live.napier.ac.uk).
The email states it contains a copy of the Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct and requests electronic signing.
The extracted text does not include the binary content of the attached Student Licence PDF. A binary extraction tool is needed to recover the embedded PDF from the original source files.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Binary Extraction Report for NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029

**Task:** task-extract-student-licence-pdf-binary
**Sources:** NAP-SRC-0028, NAP-SRC-0029

### Summary
Both source PDFs contain an email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra dated 12 March 2026, with an attached file named 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB). The text extraction (pdftotext) captured only the email body and attachment metadata; the binary PDF attachment was not extracted.

### Next Steps
1. Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., `pdfdetach`, `mutool`, or a Python script with `PyPDF2`/`pdfplumber`) to extract the embedded attachment from the original source files.
2. Once extracted, run OCR or text extraction on the Student Licence PDF to obtain its contents.
3. Compare the extracted Student Licence with the email body to confirm it is the referenced Tenancy Agreement & Code of Conduct.

### Risk
Without the embedded PDF, the full tenancy terms and code of conduct are unavailable for review, which may affect the assessment of accommodation arrears.
proposed_artifacts.title: Binary Extraction Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use a binary extraction tool (e.g., pdfdetach, mutool, or Python with PyPDF2) to extract the embedded 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' attachment from the original source files NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029. Save the extracted PDF as a new source artifact. Then run OCR/text extraction on the extracted PDF to obtain its contents.
proposed_tasks.title: Binary extraction of embedded Student Licence PDF from NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 using binary tool

risk_flags.description: The embedded Student Licence PDF has not been extracted; the tenancy terms and code of conduct referenced in the email are not yet available for review.

summary: Both NAP-SRC-0028 and NAP-SRC-0029 are PDFs of the same email from Edinburgh Napier University to Anfal Elbushra, dated 12 March 2026, attaching a 'MISS ANFAL ELBUSHRA Student Licence.pdf' (3 MB). The extracted text does not contain the embedded binary PDF; only the email body and attachment metadata are present. A binary extraction task is required to recover the attached Student Licence PDF from the original source files.

uncertainties.reason: The extracted text only shows the email body and attachment metadata; the actual Student Licence PDF binary is not present in the text extraction.
